text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A new year has begun, and it's time for Kawakami
Princess and I to take on her classic year...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sniffle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Princess Fighter episode thirty-eight just gets me every time!

text_block_list.name: Dark Princess
text_block_list.text:
"You have no idea how many dreams I've
snatched away..."

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
"Then you must make amends by supporting
others all you can! It's not too late!"

text_block_list.name: Princess Fighter
text_block_list.text:
"You don't need to envelop the world in
darkness—you're already strong enough! Just
think of the passionate battles that might await
us..."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, what a beautiful scene! I want to be just like
Princess Fighter one day!
choice_data_list: Why are you watching that in here?
Why are you watching that in here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Happy New Year! I came to wish you all the—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hwah?! T-Trainer! I remember you said you did
some studying before...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
B-b-but that disc over there... Is that from the
first-generation Princess Fighter box set?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ohhhh! Awesome! Do we get to start the new year
watching Princess Fighter?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
...And so we agreed to watch it together! Did you
forget? That was only three hours ago, you know.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But if I keep going at this rate, I might finish
watching all of it... Hmm.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's go out! ♪ Don't forget your wallet
and phone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Isn't it obvious?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Behold! Here they have the final episode of
Princess Fighter, the movie, and even the latest
series!
choice_data_list: How did I know it would come to this?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with that lukewarm reaction? Let's
hurry and decide which episodes to rent!

text_block_list.name: Monitor
text_block_list.text: "After all... I'm a princess!"

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wooow! There's that famous line! So... awesome!
choice_data_list: You really do love Princess Fighter, huh?
You really do love Princess Fighter, huh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Heh, but of course! I learned everything I know
about princesses from this show! It's no
exaggeration to say it changed my whole life!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess is full of spunk and bravery, but
blessed with the dignity and grace to show mercy
to her enemies. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You know, now that I think about it, King could
totally be a Princess Fighter heroine herself. A
first-rate Princess Fighter with an unbreakable
will.
choice_data_list:
By the way, weren't you going to rent
something?

By the way, weren't you going to rent
something?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Y-you're right! Which one should we pick, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I've seen them all, so I'll leave the choice up to
you. Just go with your gut. ♪
choice_data_list:
Episode forty-five, where Princess Fighter takes
her speed to the very limit.

The uplifting Princess Fighter concert footage,
which came out recently.

The Princess Fighter movie, which shows all her
awesome special moves.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: AWE-SOME choice! Ahhh, you've got great taste, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Well then, let's hurry back. We're going to spend
the entire day indulging in Princess Fighter
goodness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I spend the whole day watching Princess
Fighter with Kawakami Princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I-is that the video that just released recently? The
one that isn't even available for rental? The one
that's priced well beyond the average student's
budget?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh, you're so right!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Okay, go buy that—I mean, would you please buy
it so we can watch it together?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterwards, Kawakami Princess's eyes sparkle with
boundless joy as we watch the concert footage
together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ooooh! I see, I see! So that's your decision, eh?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: An excellent choice indeed. Now then...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Let's get the first movie, the Stars movie, the
Versus movie, the first All-Stars movie, the P♭
movie, the second All-Stars movie, and...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess continues to list title after
title...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like my lunch breaks will be taken up by
Princess Fighter movies for the foreseeable
future...
